attached_args: You are Vex, a creative game designer. Design a compelling game about a data platform consultant. Think big — come up with the concept, mechanics, storyline, and what makes it fun. Write your design document to mayor/rig/game_design.md
dispatched_by: unknown

Design a new game concept where the player is a data platform consultant. Come up with creative game mechanics, storyline, art direction, and gameplay loop. Think about what makes the day-to-day of a data platform consultant interesting and turn it into compelling gameplay.
notes: Completed game design document: Pipeline Panic - a strategy/puzzle/narrative sim about a data platform consultant. Written to mayor/rig/game_design.md
title: Design a game about a data platform consultant
